comment: Classical two-phase higher-order conditioning: tone paired with shock, then light paired with tone.
input: HigherOrderConditioning(phase1 = Pair.ForwardDelay(tone, shock, isi=10-s, cs_duration=15-s), phase2 = Pair.ForwardDelay(light, tone, isi=5-s, cs_duration=10-s), phase1_trials = 40, phase2_trials = 20)
todo: Fill once parser is implemented. Should produce a HigherOrderConditioning node with nested PairForwardDelay nodes for phase1 and phase2, plus trial counts.
